note: 2026-07-18 retarget REVERTED same day: user ground truth — the two left top ladders (Pauline pair) are behind an invisible barrier, unusable; the ONLY climbable finish is the right-of-middle ladder (x147), exactly where the demo pointed. The demo was right; the 'sampling bias' theory was wrong.
